products.name: VIP Rank [Lifesteal]
products.description: Unlock special VIP prefix, access to /fly in lobby, and 5 exclusive kit claims per week.

products.name: Champion Rank [Lifesteal]
products.description: Become a legend! Includes VIP perks plus /feed, /heal (60s cooldown), double coin multiplier, and 10 extra hearts on join.

products.name: 10,000 Network Coins
products.description: Get a hefty stack of network coins to spend on the Lifesteal economy and custom server shops.

products.name: 3x Mythic Crate Keys
products.description: Crack open the Mythic Crate at spawn! High chance of top-tier enchanted armor, legendary swords, and rare extra hearts.

products.name: Vampire Dragon Wings
products.description: Stunning animated custom model wings trail that makes you stand out. Purely cosmetic, looks absolutely premium.

products.name: VIP Rank [Survival]
products.description: Includes a gold prefix, access to 3 homes (/sethome), 1.5x sell-multiplier, and access to the premium VIP survival kit.

products.name: Overlord Rank [Survival]
products.description: Ultimate Survival rank. Access to /fly, /nick, 15 homes, 3x sell-multiplier, custom virtual chest (/pv), and elite tier kit.

products.name: 50,000 Survival Economy Coins
products.description: Jumpstart your claim or trade with other players. Stacks of survival currency deposited straight into your bank.

paymentSettings.instructions: Scan the QR code below using your mobile banking or payment app. Complete the payment of the exact amount specified, then take a screenshot of the transaction receipt. Join our Discord server and create a purchase ticket with your receipt to receive your item.
